title: Wevi's Modpack
description: The Vanilla Survival Experience of Your Dreams~
body:
# **Wevi's Modpack:**
## The Vannila Experience of your Dreams 
**!!!Presence Footsteps and Immersive Portals are busted for now!!!**
 

**Minecraft survival** has always felt like there are massive gameplay 
gaps between starting out and endgame so I plan on making a pack that
will fill the gaps for a more _casual experience_ with 
some QoL and _generous_ modifications.

Will add and remove stuff as time goes on. 

~~I wasn't planning on making an actual project upload, I wanted to see if there is a way to export the collection lists you make on Modrinth into Prism or Modrinth App.~~
